revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting potentially corrupted lower level templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ctime%3A05 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ctime%3A05 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#expr:{{ctime:00|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}-1-{{#time:L|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}-(
({{ctime:info|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}/1 mod 2) + 
({{ctime:info|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}/2 mod 2) +
({{ctime:info|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}/4 mod 2) + 
({{ctime:info|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}/8 mod 2) +
({{ctime:info|{{{1|{{#time:Y|+8 hours}}}}}}}/16 mod 2))}}<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"aliases": [
				"y"
			],
			"label": "year",
			"description": "The year number",
			"type": "number"
		}
	},
	"description": "To get the bias of June"
}
</templatedata>
== See also ==
* {{tl|Ctime:00}} → {{Ctime:00}}
* {{tl|Ctime:01}} → {{Ctime:01}}
* {{tl|Ctime:02}} → {{Ctime:02}}
* {{tl|Ctime:03}} → {{Ctime:03}}
* {{tl|Ctime:04}} → {{Ctime:04}}
* {{tl|Ctime:06}} → {{Ctime:06}}
* {{tl|Ctime:07}} → {{Ctime:07}}
* {{tl|Ctime:08}} → {{Ctime:08}}
* {{tl|Ctime:09}} → {{Ctime:09}}
* {{tl|Ctime:10}} → {{Ctime:10}}
* {{tl|Ctime:11}} → {{Ctime:11}}
* {{tl|Ctime:12}} → {{Ctime:12}}
[[Category:Chinese traditional date and time templates]]
}}
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
